funds.thesis: Pure-play gaming fund investing in game developers, gaming technologies, and gamification. One of the most active gaming VCs globally with 67+ investments.

notable_portfolio.description: Mobile gaming studio acquired by Playtika for up to $300M (2024)
notable_portfolio.relevance: Successful exit validating fund's mobile gaming thesis

notable_portfolio.description: Mobile gaming studio acquired by Playtika for up to $1.95B (2024)
notable_portfolio.relevance: Largest gaming exit in Israeli history

notable_portfolio.description: Game studio behind Splitgate Arena Warfare
Match 3 mobile game, top 10 grossing globally
Game studio founded by former Plarium founders

target_partner.name: Eitan Reisel
target_partner.title: Founder & Managing Partner
target_partner.background: Former Google executive (Strategic Partnerships), angel investor, founded Israel's first gaming-dedicated VC fund in 2020

funds.outreach_angle: VGames' Fund III (December 2024) is freshly raised and actively deploying in AI-gaming intersections. Their recent $1.95B SuperPlay exit proves thesis execution. Eitan's Google background and focus on gaming infrastructure creates alignment with our AI-driven gaming platform. The fund's operator-heavy approach values technical differentiation.
funds.strategic_value: Israel's #1 gaming VC, fresh capital, strong exit track record, operator DNA

funds.thesis: Community of independent game developers. ~50 standardized $500K investments creating a curated global peer community where management fees fund shared services.

notable_portfolio.relevance: Recent investment with Moon Beast and 1AM Gaming

target_partner.name: Ed Fries
target_partner.title: Founder & General Partner
target_partner.background: Former Microsoft VP, co-creator of Xbox, led Microsoft Game Studios through Xbox launch. Board member/advisor for dozens of gaming companies. Also known for unlocking Nintendo PlayStation prototype.

alternative_partner.name: Kelly Wallick
alternative_partner.title: Partner & Community Builder
alternative_partner.background: Founder of Indie MEGABOOTH, former IGF Chairperson

funds.outreach_angle: Ed Fries literally created the Xbox - there is no better operator credential in console gaming. 1Up's community model of 50+ indie studios creates unique distribution and feedback opportunities. Our AI gaming platform would benefit from their indie developer network for both talent and early user acquisition. Ed's technical background ensures appreciation for our infrastructure approach.
funds.strategic_value: Xbox co-creator pedigree, 80+ investments, indie developer community access

funds.thesis: Gaming and interactive media practice managing largest dedicated gaming fund pool. Investing in game studios, platforms, and AI applications for gaming including foundation models for spatiotemporal reasoning.

notable_portfolio.description: Mobile game studio with hit titles

target_partner.name: Moritz Baier-Lentz
target_partner.title: Senior Partner & Head of Gaming & Interactive Media
target_partner.background: Former professional gamer (Diablo II), ex-BITKRAFT partner who scaled firm to #1 gaming VC 2020-2022. Stanford lecturer on gaming and AI. Led investments in Fortnite, Call of Duty, League of Legends creators.

alternative_partner.name: Amy Wu
alternative_partner.title: Partner
alternative_partner.background: Former FTX Ventures, leads gaming and consumer investments

funds.outreach_angle: Moritz is a former pro gamer turned BITKRAFT partner who joined Lightspeed to build the largest gaming practice in VC. His recent focus on 'foundation models for spatiotemporal reasoning' directly aligns with our AI gaming infrastructure. The fund's Epic Games and Stability AI investments show commitment to both gaming platforms and AI - exactly our intersection.
funds.strategic_value: Largest gaming VC practice, $43B AUM, pro gamer DNA at partner level, AI gaming focus

funds.thesis: Game industry-leading content, platforms, and technology. Founded by former March Gaming team with operator experience at Google, Riot Games, Deloitte, Warner, and more.

notable_portfolio.description: Longleaf Valley - Apple Game of the Day

target_partner.name: Gregory Milken
target_partner.title: Co-Founder & Managing Director
target_partner.background: Former Co-Founder & Managing Partner at March Capital, Managing Partner of March Gaming. Led investments in Genvid Technologies, Dojo Madness, nWay, Wavedash. Avid lifelong gamer.

funds.outreach_angle: Gregory built March Gaming into a leading gaming fund and now has fresh capital with 1AM Gaming. His portfolio includes game mastery platforms (Dojo Madness) and interactive broadcasting (Genvid) - showing appetite for gaming infrastructure. 1AM's operator team from Riot, Google, and Warner brings valuable distribution partnerships.
funds.strategic_value: Fresh fund from experienced gaming investor, Riot/Google/Warner operator network, LA gaming hub access

funds.thesis: Seed and early-stage technology companies with strong focus on gaming, consumer products, and Bitcoin ecosystem. Group of serial entrepreneurs investing own money and actively partnering with founders.

notable_portfolio.description: Clash of Clans, Clash Royale creator - #1 iOS game company

target_partner.name: Kristian Segerstrale
target_partner.title: Co-Founder & Partner
target_partner.background: Co-founded Glu Mobile and Playfish (acquired by EA for $300M+). EVP Digital at Electronic Arts. Executive Chairman at Super Evil Megacorp. Led seed investment in Supercell.

funds.outreach_angle: Kristian led the seed round in Supercell - arguably the most successful gaming investment of the last decade. His co-founding of Playfish and Glu Mobile plus EVP role at EA gives him unmatched mobile gaming expertise. Initial Capital led Supercell's seed when others passed - they have a proven pattern of identifying category-defining gaming companies early.
funds.strategic_value: Supercell seed investor, legendary gaming track record, EA/Glu/Playfish DNA, Super Evil Megacorp network
